content_body:
Beautiful home! Loved spending time with our kids and grandkids altogther in this wonderful setting. We will have memories that will stay with us forever! We would definitely stay here again! Thank you!

Dollar Game!
We found the dollar but it fell behind the moose.... So we hid a new one!
Clue:
Are you aching for some "HOT" bacon?
Hollar if you find the Dollar
title: We will have memories that will stay with us forever!
